transcription.text: Any plate can be a soda fountain now With Great Shakes, with Great Shakes Add milk and shake it up and drink it down right now New Great Shakes, new Great Shakes Tastes so good now, chocolatey good now It's so creamy, smooth and dreamy There's no more now, better get more now Go to the store and get Great Shakes New Great Shakes tastes like a soda fountain shake Great Shakes comes with four servings packed in its own shaker And it's ready in seconds Just add milk and shake it Any place can be a soda fountain now With Great Shakes, with Great Shakes So if you want your own soda fountain now Go to the store and get Great Shakes Great Shakes, Great Shakes Great Shakes

segments.text: Any plate can be a soda fountain now
With Great Shakes, with Great Shakes
Add milk and shake it up and drink it down right now
New Great Shakes, new Great Shakes
Tastes so good now, chocolatey good now
It's so creamy, smooth and dreamy
There's no more now, better get more now
Go to the store and get Great Shakes
New Great Shakes tastes like a soda fountain shake
Great Shakes comes with four servings packed in its own shaker
Just add milk and shake it
Any place can be a soda fountain now
With Great Shakes, with Great Shakes
So if you want your own soda fountain now
Go to the store and get Great Shakes
